file.fileData:
# Run Your Entire Business From One Screen
> **Stop juggling spreadsheets, disconnected tools, and manual processes.** GrowERP is the open-source, AI-powered ERP that unifies your operations — accounting, inventory, orders, CRM, marketing, and more — in a single, intuitive platform.
---
### Is Your Business Ready to Level Up? Take our free 2-minute assessment and discover how GrowERP can transform your operations:
**[Take the ERP Readiness Assessment](/assessmentLanding?landingPageId=ERP_LANDING_PAGE)**
---
## Why GrowERP?
### All-in-One Platform From quote to paid invoice, from warehouse to website — manage every aspect of your business without switching between tools. Dashboard, catalog, orders, inventory, accounting, marketing, and website management all in one place.
### AI-Powered Automation Transform your business into an **AI Native Company**. Our Agent Control Center lets you deploy intelligent agents that handle repetitive tasks, personalize outreach, triage leads, and provide predictive insights — all working alongside your team.
### Truly Open Source No vendor lock-in. No licensing fees. Full access to the source code under CC0 1.0 Universal license. Customize everything to fit your exact needs. Built on the rock-solid [Moqui Framework](https://www.moqui.org/) backend and [Flutter](https://flutter.dev/) frontend.
### Run Anywhere One codebase, every platform. Access GrowERP from your Web browser, Android phone, iPhone, iPad, Mac, Linux desktop, or Windows PC. Your data syncs seamlessly across all devices.
---
## Purpose-Built Applications
GrowERP isn't one-size-fits-all. Choose the application that fits your industry:
- **Admin ERP** — Complete business management with accounting, inventory, orders, CRM, marketing, AI agents, and a generated business website - **Hotel Management** — Room management, reservations with visual calendar, guest services, housekeeping, and integrated billing - **Freelance** — Client management, time tracking, project organization, invoicing, and activity monitoring - **eLearner** — Course enrollment, learning progress tracking, content delivery, and instructor management - **Health** — Patient management, appointment scheduling, health records, and billing - **Support** — Ticket management, customer communication, issue tracking, and reporting
---
## Start Your Free Trial *(NO credit card required — 2 weeks free)*
**Production Apps:** 1. Web Browser: [admin.growerp.com](https://admin.growerp.com) 2. Android: [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.growerp.admin) 3. iOS & MacOS: [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/growerp-admin-open-source/id1545521755) 4. Linux: [Snap Store](https://snapcraft.io/growerp-admin) 5. Windows: [Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9nwx6kftjnql?hl=en-US&gl=TH)
**Beta & Specialized Testing:** - Next Version: [admin.growerp.org](https://admin.growerp.org) - Hotel: [hotel.growerp.org](https://hotel.growerp.org) - Freelance: [freelance.growerp.org](https://freelance.growerp.org)
*Create a new company, select demo data, and explore! Login credentials will be sent to your email.*
---
## Follow Us
Stay updated on GrowERP development, features, and community news: - [Weekly Newsletter: Not Just ERP](https://birdsend.page/forms/6228/3tDTt3BLhY) - [Twitter/X](https://x.com/grow_erp) - [LinkedIn Group](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/4576897/) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCroM6tobneiB9zbMVnaVuTg) - [GitHub](https://github.com/growerp) - [Substack](https://substack.com/@notjusterp)

# Features
GrowERP is a comprehensive, modular ERP platform. Use only the modules you need — and add more as your business grows.
---
## AI Agent Control Center (NEW)
Empower your business to become an **AI Native Company**. The Agent Control Center provides:
- **Multi-Agent Orchestration** — Deploy coordinator and specialist agent teams that work together on complex tasks - **Scheduled Automation** — Cron-based agent execution for recurring tasks (daily digests, lead triage, content publishing) - **Scoped Tool Access** — Fine-grained allowlists control exactly which services each agent can access - **Write-Approval Governance** — Agents request human approval before executing sensitive operations - **RAG Knowledge Base** — Ingest your business documents so agents can answer questions with grounded, accurate responses - **Website Chat AI** — An always-on AI assistant that greets website visitors, answers questions, and captures leads
---
## Core ERP Modules
### Dashboard A centralized, customizable dashboard giving you real-time visibility into your business KPIs.
### User & Company Management Manage contact persons, employees, suppliers, and customers. Multi-company and multi-tenancy support with role-based access control.
### Catalog Management Support for **Services**, **Physical Products**, and **Rental** product types. Categories, variants, pricing rules, and rich product content.
### Order Management End-to-end purchase and sales order processing. Flexible line items, automated document creation (invoices, shipments), and order status tracking.
### Inventory Management Multiple warehouse locations, inbound/outbound shipments, asset tracking, and real-time stock visibility.
### Accounting Full-cycle double-entry accounting with automated posting, chart of accounts, general ledger, and financial reporting. Multi-currency support.
### Marketing & CRM - **Sales Pipeline** — Opportunity tracking from lead to close - **Campaign Management** — Omnichannel outreach campaigns (LinkedIn, Email, Social) - **Content Studio** — Author-once, publish-everywhere content creation - **Lead Scoring** — AI-powered lead scoring and triage
### Website Management Automatically generate and manage a professional, customer-facing website directly from your ERP data. Content pages, product catalogs, and e-commerce — all managed from the admin app.
---
## Platform Capabilities
- **Open Source** — CC0 1.0 Universal license. No vendor lock-in, full customization - **Multi-Platform** — Web, Android, iOS, Linux, Windows, and macOS from a single Flutter codebase - **Multi-Tenancy** — Multi-company, multi-currency, and multi-language for SaaS installations - **Extensible Architecture** — Modular building blocks (growerp_* packages) and backend components - **Demo Data** — Initialize with demo data for instant exploration - **Local or Cloud** — Run locally, in Docker, or deploy to the cloud - **Robust Backend** — Powered by [Moqui Framework](https://www.moqui.org/) with Entity Engine ORM, Service Engine, and enterprise-grade security - **Modern Frontend** — Built with [Flutter](https://flutter.dev/) for responsive, native-quality experiences

# Getting Started
Get up and running with GrowERP in minutes. No credit card required.
---
## Quick Setup (5 Minutes)
### Step 1: Choose Your App Visit [admin.growerp.com](https://admin.growerp.com) or download the app from your platform's store (see links on the home page).
### Step 2: Register Click **"Register"** at the bottom of the login screen. Enter your email address and choose a password.
### Step 3: Check Your Email The system will send you login credentials. Use them to sign in for the first time.
### Step 4: Configure Your Company You'll be prompted for your company name and preferred currency. Want to explore first? Select the option to **generate demo data** — it populates the system with sample products, orders, and customers so you can see everything in action.
### Step 5: Explore You'll land on the main dashboard. From here you can: - Browse the product catalog - Create a test order - View your auto-generated business website - Try the AI Agent Control Center - Explore accounting, inventory, and CRM modules
---
## For Developers
Want to run GrowERP locally or contribute to the project?
### Prerequisites - OpenJDK 21 - Flutter stable - Git
### Local Installation ``` git clone https://github.com/growerp/growerp cd growerp git submodule update --init --recursive ./setup-backend.sh ```
See the full [Developer Documentation](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/blob/master/docs/README.md) for detailed guides on building blocks, backend components, and AI integrations.
---
## Need Help?
- **Email Support:** support@growerp.com - **GitHub Issues:** [Report bugs or request features](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/issues) - **GitHub Discussions:** [Ask questions and share ideas](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/discussions) - **Documentation:** [41+ guides covering all aspects](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/blob/master/docs/README.md)
---
## Deleting Your Data
If you decide GrowERP isn't for you: 1. Log in as the administrator 2. Navigate to your **Personal Screen** (found under "Company" in the employee section) 3. Click the **Delete** button
> **Warning:** If you are the sole administrator, this permanently deletes the company data. This action is irreversible.

# Pricing
All plans include a **free 2-week trial** — no credit card required. Every plan gives you access to all features with no user limits.
*(Note: Pricing plans are configured as products in our catalog. See the Shop for current purchase options.)*
---
## Do It Yourself (DIY) **$49.99 / month**
Perfect for tech-savvy business owners who want full control.
- All features included - No user limit - Email support: $75/hour (48-hour response time) - Full access to documentation and community resources
---
## Do It With You (DWY) **$499 / month**
Ideal for businesses that want expert guidance during setup and ongoing operations.
- All features included - No user limit - **20 hours monthly support** included for: - Data conversion and migration - User training and support - Custom reporting - Data entry assistance - System customization - Additional support: $50/hour
---
## Do It For You (DFY) **$999 / month**
The white-glove experience — we handle the heavy lifting so you can focus on your business.
- All features included - No user limit - **40 hours monthly support** included - Same services as DWY with double the support hours - Priority response times
---
## Enterprise **Custom Pricing**
For organizations with specialized requirements, high-volume needs, or complex integrations.
- Custom SLA and support agreements - On-premise or private cloud deployment options - Dedicated account manager - Custom module development
**[Contact us at support@growerp.com](mailto:support@growerp.com)**

# AI Agent Control Center
Transform your business into an **AI Native Company**. GrowERP's built-in Agent Control Center allows you to deploy intelligent agents that execute tasks, automate workflows, and provide critical insights.
---
## What is Possible?
Our AI agents can seamlessly integrate into your daily operations:
### 🤖 Website Chat Assistant An always-on AI assistant that greets visitors, answers questions based on your knowledge base, and captures leads directly into your CRM.
### 📧 Outreach & Personalization Automate your marketing campaigns. Agents can generate highly personalized outreach messages (for LinkedIn or Email) based on a prospect's profile, increasing your response rates dramatically.
### 📊 Automated Triage & Lead Scoring Automatically scan incoming inquiries and replies. Our agents rank leads by priority (hot, warm, cold) and draft follow-up responses, notifying your team when human intervention is needed.
### 📅 Content Publishing Set up agents to automatically generate and publish social media content based on your marketing strategy, keeping your brand active online effortlessly.
### 📈 Daily Operations Digest A scheduled agent that reviews your daily performance — sales, leads, inventory issues — and delivers a concise summary to your chat room or email every morning.
---
## Secure & Governed
You are always in control: - **Scoped Permissions:** Restrict agents to only the API endpoints they need. - **Human-in-the-Loop:** Require human approval before agents can execute sensitive actions (like sending emails or processing refunds). - **RAG Knowledge Base:** Upload your own documents so agents answer questions accurately based on *your* business data.
## Need Help Setting Up AI? Our team can help you configure and deploy specialized agents tailored to your business needs. **[Contact Support](mailto:support@growerp.com)** to learn more.

# Use Cases
GrowERP ships purpose-built applications for different industries. Each application uses the same modular building blocks, customized for specific workflows.
---
## Admin ERP The complete business management solution.
- **Dashboard** — Real-time KPIs and business overview - **Catalog** — Products, services, and rental items with variants and pricing rules - **Orders** — Purchase and sales order lifecycle management - **Inventory** — Multi-location warehouse management and shipment tracking - **Accounting** — Double-entry ledger, automated posting, financial reports - **CRM & Marketing** — Sales pipeline, campaign management, AI-powered outreach - **Website** — Auto-generated business website managed from the admin panel - **AI Agents** — Control center for deploying AI assistants and automations
**[Try Admin ERP](https://admin.growerp.com)**
---
## Hotel Management Specialized for the hospitality industry.
- **Room Management** — Room types, bed configurations, amenities, and availability - **Reservations** — Visual day/week calendar with drag-and-drop booking - **Guest Services** — Check-in/out, special requests, and guest communication - **Housekeeping** — Room status tracking and task assignment - **Billing** — Integrated invoicing and payment processing
**[Try Hotel App](https://hotel.growerp.org)**
---
## Freelance Management Built for independent professionals and small agencies.
- **Client Management** — Contact database with communication history - **Time Tracking** — Log hours against projects and tasks - **Project Organization** — Tasks, milestones, and deliverables - **Invoicing** — Generate professional invoices from tracked time - **Activity Monitoring** — Workload visibility and productivity insights
**[Try Freelance App](https://freelance.growerp.org)**
---
## eLearner A student-facing learning platform.
- **Course Enrollment** — Browse and enroll in available courses - **Progress Tracking** — Visual learning progress and completion status - **Content Delivery** — Structured lessons, materials, and assessments - **Instructor Management** — Manage educators and course assignments
---
## Health Healthcare practice management.
- **Patient Management** — Patient records and contact information - **Appointment Scheduling** — Calendar-based scheduling with reminders - **Health Records** — Secure storage of patient health data - **Billing** — Insurance and direct billing with accounting integration
---
## Support Customer support and ticketing.
- **Ticket Management** — Create, assign, and track support tickets - **Customer Communication** — Threaded conversations with customers - **Issue Tracking** — Categorization, priority levels, and resolution tracking - **Reporting** — Response times, resolution rates, and team performance
---
## Build Your Own GrowERP's modular architecture means you can build custom applications using existing building blocks:
- Mix and match `growerp_*` Flutter packages - Create custom backend components for Moqui - Define industry-specific workflows - Design tailored user interfaces
See the [Developer Documentation](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/blob/master/docs/README.md) for guides on creating custom applications.

# About Us
GrowERP is brought to you by **AntWebsystems Co., Ltd**, an officially registered software development company in Thailand under European management.
## Our Expertise
With years of experience developing and extending business applications, we have deep expertise in building enterprise-grade ERP and CRM systems. We are currently supporting installations in North America, Europe, and Asia.
Our extensive background as top contributors and committers to major open-source frameworks has shaped our approach: we build highly capable, modular systems designed for scale and flexibility. GrowERP is the culmination of our mission to bring advanced, AI-powered business management to everyone.
## How We Work
We believe in transparency and rapid iteration. We utilize agile software development methodologies (like Scrum) to ensure our partners and customers can see progress on a daily basis.
When you work with us for customization or support, you benefit from: - Clear, time-boxed delivery cycles (1-4 weeks) - Daily visibility into the development process - Flexible requirement changes with minimal impact on implementation - Quality support at competitive rates
## Open Source Philosophy
GrowERP is released under the **CC0 1.0 Universal** (Public Domain) license. This means: - **No licensing fees** — ever - **Full source code access** — customize anything - **No vendor lock-in** — you own your data and your deployment - **Community-driven** — contributions from developers worldwide improve the platform for everyone
## Contact & Support
Whether you need requirements gathering, implementation, custom interfacing, or managed production systems, we are ready to help.
- **Email Support:** support@growerp.com / support@antwebsystems.com - **GitHub:** [github.com/growerp](https://github.com/growerp) - **LinkedIn:** [GrowERP Group](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/4576897/) - **Twitter/X:** [@grow_erp](https://x.com/grow_erp)
**[Let us know how we can help you within 24 hours.](mailto:support@antwebsystems.com)**

# Privacy Policy
**Effective Date:** October 2024
This Privacy Policy explains how The system GrowERP collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards your information when you use our application (App). By using our App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
## 1. Information We Collect ### a. Personal Information We may collect personal information that you provide directly to us, such as: Name, Email address, Phone number, Payment information when you use the E-Commerce part. ### b. Usage Data We may collect information automatically when you use our App, including: Device type and model, IP address, Operating system version, App usage information.
## 2. How We Use Your Information - To provide, maintain, and improve the App - To personalize your experience - To process transactions and send related information - To communicate with you about updates, promotions, or news related to the app - To analyze usage trends and monitor app performance
## 3. How We Share Your Information We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except as follows: Service Providers and Legal Requirements.
## 4. Data Security We take the security of your data seriously and use safeguards to protect your information.
## 5. Your Rights You have the right to Access, Correction, Deletion, and Opt-out.
## 6. Third-Party Links We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of third-party websites or services linked from our App.
## 7. Children's Privacy Our App is not intended for children under the age of 13.
## 8. Changes to This Privacy Policy We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
## 9. Contact Us If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: support@growerp.com
